testcase.name: test_stamp_preview_rectangle
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_transparent_stamps.py:107: in test_stamp_preview_rectangle assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to generate rectangle stamp: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to generate rectangle stamp: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
